titleStmt.title: SII 41.247: original edition by S. Rajagopal
No. 247. (A.R. No. 465 of 1905.) Tiruvālaṅgāḍu, Tiruttani Taluk, Chittoor District. On the east wall of the first prakārā of the Naṭarājaśvamin shrine in the Vaṭāranēśvara temple at Tiruvālaṅgāḍu.

summary.p: Partly built in. Gives elaborate details relating to the war of Pāṇḍya succession in which the Singhalese generals Lenkāpura-Daṇḍanāyakka and Jayadratha Daṇḍanāyakka took part on behalf of the Pāṇḍya king opposing the Chōḻa side. Appreciating the important role played by his chief commander Paḻaiyaṉūr-uḍaiyān Vēdavaṉam-uḍaiyāṉ Ammai-appaṉ alias Aṇṇan Pallavarājan in the succession dispute, the king granted to the chief ten vēli of land free of taxes in the village Rājarājan-Paḻaiyaṉūr in Nenmali-nāḍu. The king's order relating to the grant is addressed to the trustees of the Tiruvālaṅgāḍuḍaiyār temple.
[Published in Epigraphia Indica vol. XXII, No, 14.]

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . kaṭalcūḻnta pārmātaruṅ kalaimātarum Aṭal cūḻnta por
mātarum cīrmātarum Amarntu vāḻa nāṟkaṭal cūḻ puviēḻum pāṟkaṭal cūḻ pukaḻpara
ppa Ātiukamāmeṉṉac cotimuṭi puṉaintaruḷi Āṟu śamaiyamum Aimpūtamum ne
ṟiyil niṉṟu pārippat teṉṉavaruñ ceralaruñ ciṅkaḷarum mutalāya maṉṉavarkaḷ tiṟai
cumantu vantiṇṭic cevippa Ūḻiūḻi Oru ceṅkol Ēḻupārum Iṉitaḷippac cempoṉ vira[si*]
ṅṅācanattu Ulakuṭai mukkokkiḻāṉaṭikaḷoṭum viṟṟiruntaruḷiya kovi rāja kesari paṉmarāṉa
tiripuvaṉaccakkaravarttikaḷ śrīirājādhirāja devarkku yāṇṭu paṉṉiraṇṭāvatu nāḷ nūṟṟaiymapat
teḻiṉāl tiripuvaṉaccakravatti koneriṉmai koṇṭāṉ jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻamaṇṭalattu meṉ
malaip paḻaiyaṉūr nāṭṭup paḻaiyaṉūr Uṭaiyār tiruvālaṅkāṭuṭaiyār koyilil tevakaṉmikku
m śrīmāheśvavarak kaṇkāṇi ceyvārkaḷukkum . paḻaiyaṉūr Uṭaiyāṉ vetavaṉamuṭaiyāṉ Ammai A
ppaṉāṉa Aṇṇaṉ pallava[rāja]ṉ Īḻattāṉ parākkiramapāku Āḻvāṉ pote tuṭaṅki coḻarājyattukku
virotamāyiruppaṉa palapaṭikaḷāluñceyyappārttu Itukku Uṟuppākap pāṇṭi-nāṭṭile paṭai
yuṟaviṭṭu kulacekaraṉaiyum maturaiyil niṉṟum veḷḷāṟṟukku vaṭakaraiyile po
tap paṇṇiṉapaṭiyāle mceyyappārtta Iṭattu Itukkup parikāramāka kula
cekararkku vēṇṭuvaṉavuñ ceytu mutalikaḷum paṭaikaḷum pokaviṭṭu Īḻattāṉ paṭaiyaiyu
m Ippaṭaikkuk kārāṇavar Āṉa Ilaṅkāpura taṇṭanāyakkaṉum jakat trayat taṇṭanāyakkaṉum Uḷḷiṭṭā
raiyuṅ koṉṟu maturai vācalilē Ivarkaḷ talaikaḷai taippittu Ivvūrile kulacekaraiyum pukaviṭṭuc ce
llā niṟka ku virotamāyiruppaṉa ceyyappārttu Ivaṉ taṉ paṭai
nilaiyāṉa pulaicceri māttōṭṭam vallikāmam maṭṭivāḻ Uḷḷiṭṭa Ūrkaḷile paṭaikaḷu
m pukutaviṭṭu paṭavukaḷuñ ceyvikkiṟapaṭi keṭṭu Itukkup parikāramāka Īḻattāṉ marumakaṉārāy Īḻarājyattukkuṅ
kaṭavarāy muṉpe pontirunta civallavarai Aḻaippittu Ivarkku veṇṭuvaṉavuñceytu Ivaraiyum I
varuṭaṉe veṇṭum paṭaikaḷaiyum Ūrāttuṟai vallikāmam maṭṭivāḻ Uḷḷiṭṭa Ūrkaḷile pukaviṭṭup pulaicce
ri māttōṭṭam Uḷḷiṭṭa Ūrkaḷum Aḻittu Īḻattāṉiṉavāy Ivvūrkaḷil niṉṟa Āṉaikaḷuṅ kaikkoṇ
ṭu Īḻamaṇṭalattil kiḻmel Irupatiṉ kāta meṟpaṭavum teṉvaṭal muppatiṉkāta meṟpaṭavum Aḻittu It
tuṟaiyil Ivaṉ maṉiccarāy Iruntāril kolvāraiyuṅ koṉṟu piṭippāraiyum piṭittu Ivarkaḷaiyum ca
rakkāyk kaikkoṇṭaḷavum piṭitta Āṉaikaḷum Aḻaippittu Ivaṉ namakkuk kāṭṭi Īḻamaṇṭalattuk kāriya
m Ellāppaṭiyālum Ivaṉ Aḻiyac ceyvittapaṭikkum pāṇṭiyaṉār kulacekarar tamakku muṉpu ceyta
naṉmaikaḷum pārāte Īḻattāṉuṭaṉe campantam paṇṇavum Ivaṉum Ivaruṅkūṭaniṉṟu coḻarājyattuk
ku virotamāyiruppaṉa ceyyavuṅ kaṭavatāka niccayittu Itukku Uṟuppākap pāṇṭināṭṭu Ēḻakattārilum maṟṟac
cāmantarilum namakkuc cervupaṭṭu niṉṟuṭaṉ ceykiṟa Irājarājakkaṟkuṭiyarāyaṉum Irājakampīra Añcukōṭ
ṭai nāṭāḻvāṉum Uḷḷiṭṭārai Attuṟaikaḷil niṉṟum veḷḷāṟṟukku vaṭakaraiyilē pōtappaṇṇi
Ilaṅkāpurit taṇṭanāyakkaṉum jakat trayat taṇṭanāyakkaṉum Uḷḷiṭṭār talaikaḷāy maturai vācaliṟ taicca talai
kaḷum vāṅkip pokaṭuviṭṭu Ellāt tīmaikaḷum ceyyak kaṭavatākak karutic ceykiṟapaṭiyum Īḻattāṉ kulacekarar Uṭa
ṉ kūṭaniṉṟu Utavi ceykai cuṭṭi Ivaruṭaṉ cārvupaṭṭu niṉṟārkku varakkāṭṭiṉa Ōlaikaḷum vastukkaḷum vaḻiyile Iva paṭiyālum coḻarājyattukkuvirotamāy-irukkaiyāle Ivaṉai
Aṅku niṉṟum pokki muṉpe piṭittu maturaikkuk kāraṇavārāṉa parākkirama pāṇṭiyar makaṉār vīrapāṇṭiya tevarai maturai I vastuvāluṅ kutiraiyālum veṇṭuvaṉavaiyiṟṟil namakkuc co
llic ceyyaveṇṭuvaṉavuñ ceyvittu Allātaṉa Ivaṉe mikutippaṭa nerntum ceytu curukkiṉa nāḷaikkuḷḷe maturai tevavaḷanāṭṭu neṉmalināṭṭu Irājarājan paḻaiyaṉūrile patiṟṟu
vēli nilam paṉṉiraṇṭāvatu mutal Antarāyam pāṭṭam Uṭpaṭa Iṟaiyiliyāka Iṭṭu Ippaṭi Uṭaiyār tiruvālaṅkāṭuṭaiya mūventaveḷāṉ . Ivai nīlakaṅkarāyaṉ Eḻuttu .§
Ivai tīpattarayaṉ Eḻuttu .§ Ivai kaṉakarājaṉ Eḻuttu .§ Ivai malaiyappirājaṉ Eḻuttu .§ Ivai maḻava
tu .§ Ivai villavarāyaṉ Eḻuttu§
Digital edition of SII 41.247 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
